companyContext: Tourism & entertainment technology company — BGC, Taguig City
responsibilities: Developed full-stack applications using Laravel/Filament for backend and Next.js for frontend, enhancing system scalability and reliability
Designed and maintained relational database systems, improving data management and application performance
Implemented multi-tenant architectures with microservices using HTTP APIs, Apache Kafka, and RabbitMQ, employing Saga pattern for distributed transactions and event-driven communication
Built and maintained Kafka producers and consumers to enable asynchronous processing, service decoupling, and high-throughput data pipelines
Introduced feature flag strategies and idempotency techniques, ensuring consistent and reliable operations across distributed systems
Created unit tests with Pest and E2E tests with Playwright, boosting software quality assurance
Mentored and onboarded 5 new developers, fostering skill development and team integration
Managed projects end-to-end, overseeing repository management and enforcing version control best practices
Conducted 15+ technical interviews to streamline the recruitment process
outcomeMetric: Tech Lead · 6 production systems · Mentored 5 devs · 15+ interviews

projects.name: Marketing Tool (LINE Integration)

projects.description: Corporate website with integrated booking system and content management for tour packages

projects.name: Casino Cage System
projects.description: Inventory management system for casino chips and money with real-time forex exchange rate integration

projects.name: E-Wallet System
projects.description: Backend API for mobile wallet — send/receive, deposit, withdrawal, currency exchange, and secure money hashing. Separate mobile app team consumed the API.

projects.name: Coupon & Ads Management System
projects.description: SaaS platform with multi-tenancy for coupon management, ad campaigns, scheduling, analytics, and subscription billing via microservices

projects.name: E2E Testing Suite
projects.description: Comprehensive test automation with Pest unit tests and Playwright E2E coverage across all systems

companyContext: Software consultancy — CMS, eCommerce, and SaaS platforms for enterprise clients
responsibilities: Built a learning management system, 2 eCommerce platforms, and a multi-tenant SaaS platform using Node.js, Next.js, Laravel/Filament, and Tailwind CSS

Implemented Saga pattern with idempotency on an eCommerce platform using Kafka-based microservices across 5 services (inventory, CMS, user management, payment, wallet) with third-party product integration
Developed a SaaS platform combining content management, learning management, and eCommerce with multi-tenancy, subscription, and analytics
Implemented SCRUM Agile methodologies, achieving timely delivery and improving project timelines by 15%
Designed and maintained MySQL database structures for service-focused platforms
Managed version control and code tracking using Git across development teams
outcomeMetric: 4 production systems · Kafka microservices (5 services) · Multi-tenant SaaS
